reason: Code review checklist — forbidden patterns, required patterns for scenes/scripts
GDScript standards compliance — type annotations, naming conventions
Scene composition verification — loose coupling, no sibling references
Error handling patterns — null checks, assert usage

summary: Paint MVP mostly meets PRD. STORM acceptance item not implemented (intentional, user-deferred). Mouse-click paint commented out (PRD lists it as 'also an option', not required). Self-fixed: replaced stdout print() with push_warning in lava DOT.

findings.msg: PRD AC 'Standing on storm terrain applies knockback/position offset' not met. STORM enum value missing from PaintType (paint_layer.gd lines 9-14 only define ICE/LAVA/VINE; tscn has 4 atlas sources but only 3 terrains). _physics_process match branch and _apply_storm_knockback() are commented out. Known gap: user explicitly deferred storm.

Mouse-click paint is commented. PRD Decisions section calls it 'also an option', not strictly required. Action-triggered paint (attack/throw/dodge) is implemented and covers the main acceptance criteria. Document the deferral instead of fixing.
paint_type defaults to ICE for MVP. PRD says weapon should determine paint type. Acceptable for MVP scope (weapon system is out of scope) but should be wired through @export or weapon module later.

PaintLayer 8x8 tileset configured via tscn (terrain_set_0 + 4 atlas sources). Mouse-action-triggered paint patterns (fan/area/path) all implemented. paint_manager batches via paint_cells -> set_cells_terrain_connect, single auto-tile pass per call.

Trigger chain intact: player._unhandled_input -> PaintManager.paint_{fan,area,path} -> paint_layer.paint_cells -> set_cells_terrain_connect. Detection chain: player._update_debuff -> PaintManager.get_paint_at -> paint_layer.get_paint_at -> get_cell_tile_data().terrain. Both directions typed end-to-end.

All four paint_manager methods (paint_at/fan/area/path) consistently follow 'collect cells -> single paint_cells call' pattern; fan/path dedupe with Dictionary. PaintLayerScript preload path identical in player.gd and paint_manager.gd.

No circular dep. paint_manager preloads paint_layer.gd; player.gd preloads same script for the enum. PaintManager autoload is injected via main.gd._ready (PaintManager.paint_layer = $PaintLayer), avoiding scene-search timing fragility.
PaintType enum order in paint_layer.gd matches tscn terrain ids (ICE=0, LAVA=1, VINE=2). Comments document the alignment.
main.tscn applies z_index=1 override on PaintLayer instance so it renders on top of GroundLayer (default z_index=0). y_sort_enabled=false on Main, so explicit z_index is required.

Action animations (attack/throw/dodge) gated via 'animation in ACTION_ANIMS and animation.is_playing()' check before idle/run override. SpriteFrames have loop=false on these three so is_playing() goes false at end.

_update_debuff sets current_debuff=NONE when paint underfoot is NONE; debuff_timer resets when transitioning. effective_speed/effective_accel default to base values (no NONE match branch). lava DOT stops accumulating cleanly.
godot --headless --quit-after 30 completes with no parse/load errors after self-fix.

self_fixes.change: Replaced print() debug log in _apply_lava_dot with push_warning(); print() in _physics_process inner loop is a stdout-spam liability.

spec_sync_suggestions: spec/frontend/component-guidelines.md: document 'autoload + explicit injection' pattern (PaintManager pattern) as the recommended alternative to autoload-self-search.

spec/frontend/quality-guidelines.md: add 'Sibling render order' note — when y_sort is off, sibling z_index override on tscn instance node is the way to fix overlap (cite main.tscn PaintLayer/GroundLayer).
spec/frontend/component-guidelines.md: tilemap auto-tile pattern — use set_cells_terrain_connect with peering bits + a single batched call, not direct set_cell, for smooth borders.

spec/frontend/type-safety.md or new gdscript section: action-animation guard pattern (loop=false + 'animation in ACTION_ANIMS and is_playing()' check before idle/run) for non-interruptible action anims.
spec/frontend/component-guidelines.md: PaintType enum ordered to match tscn terrain ids — call out 'enum-tscn id alignment' contract as a maintenance hazard.
verdict_rationale: Implementation passes 11/12 PRD acceptance items. The only failed item (STORM debuff) is an explicit user-deferred gap. No regressions in player movement; godot load is clean.
